settings.heading: Warranty & Support
settings.subtext: Having an issue with your NuraCom product? Submit a warranty claim below and our team will get back to you within 1–2 business days.
settings.desc_placeholder: Please describe the issue in detail — what happened, when it started, and what you've noticed.
settings.disclaimer: We will review your claim and respond within 1–2 business days via email.
settings.issue_types: Product Defect, Motor / Mechanical Issue, Remote / Controls Not Working, UV Lamp Issue, LED Light Issue, Fan / Drying Issue, Noise / Vibration, Physical Damage on Arrival, Missing Parts / Accessories, Other

settings.heading: Warranty & Returns Policy
settings.intro: All Nuracom products are covered by a limited warranty, subject to the terms below. This page covers exactly what's included, what isn't, and how to make a claim — so there are no surprises.
settings.tier_1_desc: Covers manufacturing defects on the complete unit, including parts and labour.
settings.tier_2_desc: Covers replacement parts only. Labour not included after the first year.
settings.tier_3_desc: Covers motor-related faults under normal residential use.
settings.covered_sub: Faults and defects that arise from normal residential use.
settings.covered_richtext:
• Manufacturing defects
  • Faulty components under normal residential use
  • Electrical or mechanical failures not caused by external factors
  • Motor faults under normal use (up to 5 years)
settings.excluded_sub: Damage and scenarios that fall outside normal residential use.
settings.excluded_richtext:
• Incorrect installation or improper use
  • Damage caused by moisture, water ingress, or environmental conditions
  • Physical damage, misuse, or neglect
  • Normal wear and tear
  • Unauthorised modifications or repairs
  • Power surges or external electrical issues
  • Commercial use (unless agreed in writing)
settings.claim_title: How to make a warranty claim
settings.claim_sub: Three simple steps. Most claims are resolved within a few business days of submission.
settings.step_1_desc: Your original Nuracom order confirmation or invoice is all we need to verify coverage.
settings.step_2_desc: Log in to your account and complete the warranty claim form — takes under five minutes.
settings.step_3_title: Upload photos or a short video
settings.step_3_desc: Show us what's happening. A 30-second video is often enough — we'll take it from there.
settings.callout_text: Simple online claim process — upload a short video and we'll take care of the rest.
settings.returns_sub: If Nuracom isn't right for your home, send it back within 30 days for a refund — conditions apply.
settings.returns_accepted_richtext:
• Product is unused
  • Packaging is intact and original
  • Item is in resellable condition
  • Request is made within 30 days of delivery
settings.returns_rejected_richtext:
• Product has been installed or used
  • Packaging is damaged, missing, or not original
  • Item is not in resellable condition
  • Request is made after 30 days
settings.returns_note: Return shipping is paid by the customer. Full refunds are issued after the returned item has been inspected and confirmed to meet the above conditions.
settings.legal_richtext:
• Installation must be carried out correctly and, where required, by a licensed electrician.
  • This warranty applies to residential use only.
  • Nuracom is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from product use or installation.
  • Nothing in this policy limits your rights under the Australian Consumer Law.
